meaning: carrier(运载布伦式轻机枪及机枪手的)履带式小型装甲车
examples: Could You Please Oblige Us With a Bren Gun?
A bren carrier of the 33 th Field Artillery Regiment crossing the place Courbet (actual).
The refund check Kamil allegedly stole was the result of overpayment of estimated quarterly taxes by Bren.
Bren, through his company, transferred the final 20, 000 acres of that gift to Orange County in June 2010.
But surely Bren could afford more than that, argued her Los Angeles lawyer, Hillel Chodos, in court papers.
